chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Obligation of Shortening the Fast During Travel

text: 1975 - وَ رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ حَكِيمٍ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «لَوْ أَنَّ رَجُلاً مَاتَ صَائِماً فِي اَلسَّفَرِ لَمَا صَلَّيْتُ عَلَيْهِ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1975 - Muhammad ibn Hakim narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that he said:
"If a man were to die while fasting during travel, I would not perform the funeral prayer for him."
